clusters.leadHeadline: NFL Rookie Deals Will Top $50M for First Time Since 2010
clusters.summary: Top NFL draft pick will command nearly $55M deal, marking significant salary inflation for rookie contracts. First time since 2010 that rookie deals breach the $50M threshold.

clusters.leadHeadline: Liberty Stars Take Pay Cuts Under New WNBA CBA Structure
clusters.summary: New CBA makes it harder for teams to sign multiple max players, forcing Liberty Stars players into salary reductions. Demonstrates labor market constraints from collective bargaining agreement.

clusters.leadHeadline: College Football Transfer Portal Reshapes Talent Market in 2025
clusters.summary: College football's transfer portal and revenue-sharing agreements fundamentally reshaped player movement ahead of 2025 draft. Thin QB class at top reflects new era of college athlete compensation.

clusters.leadHeadline: San Diego Padres Business Booming Amid Ownership Transition
clusters.summary: Private equity billionaire José Feliciano expected to confirm ownership stake this week, signaling strong franchise valuation. Business performance reflects broader MLB market growth.

clusters.leadHeadline: Brandon Marshall Expands I AM ATHLETE Athlete-Owned Media Platform
clusters.summary: Former NFL star betting on athlete-owned media by scaling I AM ATHLETE platform. Reflects trend of athletes building direct-to-consumer media businesses.
